import { spec } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

const id = "spec:orders.shorthand-authored";

// A shorthand entry still names its field: the carrier fails as non-static, but no field it
// names may be reported missing on top of that (a non-static field is not an absent one).
export const shorthandCarrier = spec({
  id,
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "feature",
  readiness: "idea",
});

const base = {
  id: "spec:orders.spread-authored",
  title: "Spread-authored carrier",
} as const;

// A spread is opaque — it could carry any field — so beside it nothing can honestly be called
// missing: exactly one finding (the non-static entry), never a false absence report per field.
export const spreadCarrier = spec({
  ...base,
});
